subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-06-23
subcodes.first_line: You are always smiling. [Mr. Osborne:] Surely our faces should reflect happiness in this presence.
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @education of children; moral education, @Christ; Christianity, @oneness; unity of religion, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture
